law: Education only — not legal advice. Free HTML + Pro Stripe. No case review.

pickers.title: I'm making claims and need sourcing discipline
pickers.desc: Start: free Source Log template → upgrade for repeat use.

pickers.title: I'm worried about privacy / identification leaks
pickers.desc: Start: de-identification checklist → upgrade for drills + examples.

pickers.title: I need a correction-ready workflow
pickers.desc: Start: correction note + changelog pattern → upgrade for variants.

pickers.title: I need record hygiene (files, links, archiving)

products.name: Sourcing Discipline Pack
bullets: Log sources with dates, limits, and notes.
Reduce collapse-later errors from missing proof.
products.pro_note: Best when: you publish claims, summaries, threads, or statements and want an evidence trail that survives time.

products.name: Corrections & Update Protocol
bullets: Fix the record without rewriting history.
Log changes clearly with dates and reasons.
Reduce credibility loss from silent edits.
products.pro_note: Best when: you edit posts after publishing and want credibility to increase (not decrease) over time.

products.name: Privacy & De-identification Pack
bullets: Publish patterns safely while keeping originals private.
products.pro_note: Best when: you want to publish a pattern without exposing identities, roles, locations, or timelines.

products.name: Public Record Checklist
bullets: Prevent link rot and lost files.
Keep originals clean and store notes separately.
Maintain a simple private index for future corrections.
products.pro_note: Best when: you want your sourcing to remain verifiable months later (even if websites change).

products.name: Accountability Story Template
bullets: State limits clearly to reduce over-claiming.
Include privacy and corrections blocks by default.
products.pro_note: Best when: you want clarity, limits, and corrections readiness built into the document.

products.name: Civic Action Map (General)
bullets: Map a minimum defensible claim to next actions.
Choose what is public vs private evidence.
Set review points for updates or retractions.
products.pro_note: Best when: you need a calm next-step structure without turning it into case strategy or advice.

bundles.name: Pro Bundle
items: All Pro downloads listed in one pack

bundles.name: Team License
items: Internal use for up to 5 people

training.name: Evidence Literacy 101
training.desc: Best for anyone publishing claims who wants cleaner sourcing without turning publishing into a full-time job.

training.name: Privacy-First Publishing
training.desc: Best for publishing real-world stories while reducing doxxing-by-detail risk (time + place + role).

free_pages.title: Source Log Template (Free)
free_pages.intro: Copy/paste workflow to keep claims and evidence separate, track citations, and publish with discipline.
free_pages.template_text:
SOURCE LOG
- Source ID:
- Type (link / doc / email / screenshot / record):
- Title:
- Date accessed:
- URL or file name:
- Who created it:
- What it shows (1–2 lines):
- Reliability notes:
- Privacy notes (redactions / de-identification):

CLAIM → EVIDENCE MAP
Claim 1:
- Evidence (Source IDs):
- Limits (what this does NOT prove):
- Interpretation (label explicitly):

Claim 2:
- Evidence (Source IDs):
- Limits:
- Interpretation:

CORRECTION PATH
- How updates will be noted:
- Public changelog location:

free_pages.title: Corrections & Update Protocol (Free)
free_pages.intro: Fix the record without rewriting history — correction note + changelog pattern for any publishing format.
free_pages.template_text:
CORRECTION NOTE
- Date:
- What changed:
- Why (new info / error / context):
- What stays the same:
- Limits still apply:

CHANGELOG ENTRY
- Version:
- Timestamp:
- Summary of edit:
- Link to prior version (if archived):

free_pages.title: Privacy & De-identification Checklist (Free)
free_pages.intro: Reduce accidental identification risk before publishing — checklist + safe rewrite patterns.
free_pages.template_text:
PRIVACY CHECK (before publish)
[ ] Removed names not essential to the public point
[ ] Removed exact dates/times that enable identification
[ ] Removed addresses, workplaces, or role+place combos
[ ] Aggregated or generalized identifying details
[ ] Kept raw records private; published pattern only
[ ] Stated limits (what the public version does NOT prove)

SAFE REWRITE PATTERN
- Public claim (minimum defensible):
- What was removed and why:
- Correction path if new info arrives:

free_pages.title: Public Record Checklist (Free)
free_pages.intro: Naming rules, what to save, and a simple private index so sourcing stays verifiable months later.
free_pages.template_text:
FILE NAMING
- YYYY-MM-DD_topic_source-id.ext
- Keep originals unedited; notes in separate file

WHAT TO SAVE
- Source URL + date accessed
- Screenshot or export if link may rot
- Your claim/evidence map (private)

PRIVATE INDEX
- Record ID:
- Public post link:
- Source IDs linked:
- Next review date:

free_pages.title: Accountability Story Template (Free)
free_pages.intro: Publish with scope, sources, limits, privacy, and corrections blocks built in.
free_pages.template_text:
ACCOUNTABILITY STORY

SCOPE
- What this covers:
- What this does NOT cover:

CLAIMS (one sentence each)
1.
2.

SOURCES
- Source ID / date / limits per claim

LIMITS
- What readers should NOT infer

PRIVACY
- What stays private

CORRECTIONS
- How updates will be logged

free_pages.title: Civic Action Map (Free)
free_pages.intro: General next-step structure — not case strategy. Map a minimum defensible claim to calm actions.
free_pages.template_text:
CIVIC ACTION MAP (general)

MINIMUM DEFENSIBLE CLAIM
-

PUBLIC vs PRIVATE EVIDENCE
- Public:
- Private (index only):

NEXT STEPS (non-case)
1.
2.

REVIEW POINTS
- Date to re-check sources:
- Trigger for correction/retraction:

steps: Start free — open a template (HTML, copy/paste)
Run minimum standard — 5-minute checklist on page
Upgrade only if you repeat the work — Pro PDF optional

sandbox.title: Toolkit Sandbox (Free)
sandbox.intro: Try all six accountability templates in your browser — no account, no payment. Edits stay local (localStorage). Education only — not legal advice.
sandbox.honesty: browser_local_only · no server storage · freemium forever
